zh.lifeSummary: 當William Yelverton III, Esq於大約1480年出生在英國諾福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親Sir William Yelverton II23歲，母親Katherine Randes26歲。他於大約1515年與Margaret Gamond在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1541年2月在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Yelverton III, Esq于大约1480年出生在英国諾福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲Sir William Yelverton II23岁，母亲Katherine Randes26岁。他于大约1515年与Margaret Gamond在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1541年2月在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Yelverton III, Esq was born about 1480, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir William Yelverton II, was 23 and his mother, Katherine Randes, was 26. He married Margaret Gamond about 1515, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in February 1541, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Yelverton III, Esq est né environ 1480, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Yelverton II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Katherine Randes, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Gamond environ 1515, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en février 1541, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Yelverton III, Esq um 1480 in Rougham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Yelverton II 23 und seine Mutter Katherine Randes 26. Er hat um 1515 in London, England, United Kingdom Margaret Gamond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1541 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Yelverton III, Esq è nato il circa 1480 nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir William Yelverton II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Randes, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Gamond circa 1515, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1541, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Yelverton III, Esqが約1480年にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir William Yelverton IIは23歳，母Katherine Randesは26歳であった。約1515年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでMargaret Gamondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年2月に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Yelverton III, Esq(이)가 대략 1480년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Yelverton II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Randes(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Margaret Gamond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 2월 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Yelverton III, Esq nasceu aproximadamente 1480, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Yelverton II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Randes, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Gamond aproximadamente 1515, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1541, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Yelverton III, Esq родился около 1480 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Yelverton II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Randes, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Gamond около 1515 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер февраль 1541 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Yelverton III, Esq nació aproximadamente 1480, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Yelverton II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Katherine Randes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Gamond aproximadamente 1515, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1541, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
